goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 15:00'.
The train should go to 'peterborough' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'entertainment'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of college'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 15:00
The train should go to peterborough and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get departure time and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of entertainment
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of college
